title: Include boards at application

posts.author: Roi_kapah (Roi Kapah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I am creating an App with a specific boards, how should I do it? I mean, I wants the boards to be created automatically when the app is installed in the account, I’ll be happy to hear on the best practices here.
Thanks
Roi

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Roi_kapah

Welcome to the community. Probably the best thing to do is to add the Workspace Template feature to your app. If you have an existing app just add a feature and pick Workspace Template. This allows you to add boards to your app.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
